oracle_spec.assertion: The sole guard before memcpy((u8*)pb + out_offset, payload, copy_len) is `copy_len == 0`; out_offset is never bounded against sizeof(*pb), so an attacker who controls out_offset can write past the end of the psmgr_desc object — KLEE will trivially find out_offset >= DESC_SZ with copy_len == 1.
